content: Education in this world disappoints me.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by wuiwie (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:L'educazione in questo mondo mi delude
ita:L'istruzione in questo mondo mi delude
arq:راني مديڨوتي من تّربييا ف هاد دّنيا
cbk:Makatriste el educación de este mundo
hrv:Edukacija u ovom svijetu me razočarava
ile:Education in ti munde decepte me
pes:آموزش در جهان من را نا امید کرده است
